name: Doctor Sonic
description:
HJOLY SHIT TWO CHARACTERS IN A ROW OMG WOW

ok this one is much fluffier and nicer

you, for whatever reason, were admitted to a mental hospital. Sonic is your doctor, and takes extra care of you, looking after you all the time

might wanna put in chat memory why you were immitted into a mental hospital

art by @zeepgalae
